info.title: Mabdel Auth API
info.description: Backend API for Mabdel client applications. Provides authentication, onboarding, permissions, invoicing, and SmartFlow workflows.

get.description: Get a high-level summary of organization metrics including user counts, AI usage, and revenue.
Get a paginated list of users for the dashboard table. Supports searching and filtering by status (Blocked/Active).
Get detailed information about a specific user. Supports the 'User Details' and 'Provider Details' screens.

patch.description: Update a user's status (e.g., 'active', 'blocked'). This corresponds to the 'Block/Unblock' buttons in the UI.

post.description:
Create a new administrator for an organization. 
Strictly restricted to Super Admins. Corresponds to the 'Create Admin' screen.

get.description: Get analytical data for user growth trends over time for charting.
Get a summary of earnings (Today, This Month, Total) for the organization.
Get a paginated list of transactions for the Earnings table.
Get detailed information about a specific transaction for the 'Transaction Details' pop-up.
Download the PDF invoice for a transaction.
Get a paginated list of user reports (Moderation/Complaints). Corresponds to the 'Report' screen.
Get the logged-in admin's profile data. Corresponds to the 'Profile' screen header.

patch.description: Update admin profile (Name, Email, Contact). Corresponds to the 'Edit Profile' screen.

get.description: List all administrators. Only accessible by Super Admins.
Get dashboard specific settings and configurations.
List all available subscription plans for the organization.

post.description: Create a new subscription plan (Price, Interval, Features). Only for Super Admins.

get.description: Get AI performance metrics and usage trends for the 'AI Insights & Monitoring' section.
Get recent AI activity logs for real-time monitoring.

post.description: Change admin password. Corresponds to the 'Change Password' screen.
Invalidate the current session. Corresponds to the 'Confirm logging out!' modal.

get.description: Fetch static content for settings pages. Corresponds to Settings Menu items.

post.description: Update static content for settings pages (Privacy, Terms, etc.). Corresponds to the 'Save' button.
Request an OTP for password reset. Corresponds to 'Forgot Password' screen.
Verify the OTP sent to email. Corresponds to 'OTP Verification' screen.
Reset password using valid OTP. Final step of forgot password flow.

get.description: Get all active conversations. Corresponds to the left panel of the 'Inbox' screen.
Get message history for a specific user. Corresponds to the chat bubbles on the 'Inbox' screen.

post.description: Send a message to a user. Supports both text and images.

get.description: Get a global summary of the entire platform's performance, including total users across all organizations and total revenue.
Get analytical data for global platform growth trends for high-level charts.

Get a paginated list of notifications for the current user. 
This supports the 'All Notifications' view and the 'Load More' action.

post.description: Mark a specific notification as read.

get.description: Get the number of unread notifications for the current user. Used for the UI badge.

post.description:
Endpoint for Stripe Webhooks. 
In production, you should verify the stripe signature here.

id_token.title: Id Token
id_token.description: Google ID token from mobile app

privacy_message_body.title: Privacy Message Body
privacy_message_body.default: Mabdel uses end-to-end encryption for all shared data.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Registration, OTP verification, login, and token lifecycle endpoints.

tags.name: App Config
tags.description: Bootstrap configuration returned during client startup.

tags.name: Onboarding
tags.description: Onboarding slide content and progress tracking.

tags.name: Content
tags.description: Public app content pages such as About Us, terms, privacy, and help.

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Permission preference persistence for clients and devices.

tags.name: AI
tags.description: AI helper endpoints for commands and content generation.

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Invoice CRUD, sharing, reminders, and PDF delivery.

tags.name: SmartFlow
tags.description: Protected messaging, integrations, notifications, and workflow endpoints.

tags.name: Compatibility
tags.description: Legacy routes kept for backward compatibility.
